She idly hums to herself as one of hands comes up to tap her chin while she gazes off into the distance with a thoughtful expression for a few long moments before she returns her attention to you.

I guess the first thing to mention would probably be a few general facts, I guess. Yuki-Onna, who can also be referred to as 'snow women', are basically snow elementals, and we're typically found in much colder environments due to that fact, although we aren't limited to them, as evidenced by me being here.

And I suppose I already mentioned it a little already, but even though we {i}can{/i} live outside of cold places decently well, there are limits to that, and I'll tell you right now that none of us can deal with dry heats at all, so you won't find us living in any deserts. Yuki-Onna can deal with the cold so effectively because, believe it or not, we actually have an incredibly high core temperature, which counteracts any chill we might experience, but at the cost of being unable to effectively deal with heat.
On top of our normal high core temperature, Yuki-Onna are capable of controlling not only our own body temperature, but the temperature of the air as well. Here, let me demonstrate.
Aiko reaches out and gently grabs your arm with one hand, and you note that her skin does feel slightly warmer than yours while she raises her other hand palm up and gives you a level look.

After letting the snowflake rest for a few moments longer, Aiko smiles before closing her hand as the snowflake melts into nothingness, leaving behind a small puddle on her palm that trickles between her fingers onto the floor before quickly dissipating into the ground.

But you can see what I mean by temperature control, right? But we don't have absolute control at all times, really. Negative moods or emotions can cause us to unconsciously chill the area around us, so we always need to be careful about that. However, most of the time, it's not a problem, so there's typically no real need to worry.

I suppose if there was one last thing I'd want to say about our weather control, it'd be that we have some slight control over objects as well, but only if they're exceptionally cold, and typically only inanimate objects, like thin clothing. Here, I can show you that as well.

Aiko concentrates for a moment as a faint chill emanates from her body, and her kimono suddenly starts to move as if a sudden wind was whistling by her even though the air in the room is still, and after letting it continue for a few seconds longer she lets out the breath she was holding as her clothes settle down once more.

Oh, we're also able to sculpt our bodies a little, so we can change between soft and cuddly, or slimmer and more elegant. Nothing too overt though. Don't be afraid to ask if either of those sound like they'd fit your ideal body a little better.

She faintly blushes as she averts her eyes from you while fidgeting with her clothing.

Although I've heard stories of some Yuki-Onna being so desperate for a mate and so possessive once they find a potential partner that they just try to coerce people into staying with them by preventing them from leaving or deliberately controlling the weather to force adventurers to seek shelter, only to save them from it moments later, b-but most of us aren't like that, I promise!
There's a definite feeling of nervousness around Aiko as she worriedly looks over at you, and she lets out a tiny sigh before continuing.

But... Please don't think badly of my species because of some outdated practices, okay? I'm a perfect example of how we're not all holed up in faraway lands, waiting for some unsuspecting person to stroll along.

And if I were to say one last interesting little fact about Yuki-Onna, it's that we don't really need to eat very much. It pairs well with our reclusive nature, because we just need a little bit of food and water every once and awhile and we're good to go.
